case_title: ALICIA YOUNG VS. 1325 DIVISADERO STREET OWNERS' ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-09-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-09-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS ASKED TO COMPLETE SC-109 BUT DID NOT RETURN THE FORM TO THE COURT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY KAREN THOMPSON. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED 506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-09-2013 - JUDGMENT.
